strict_zones.name: backend-middleware
strict_zones.rationale: B-7: Auth, tenant context, RBAC, and rate-limiting middleware are the primary security enforcement layer. Gaps here directly translate to exploitable attack surface.

strict_zones.name: backend-agents
strict_zones.rationale: B-7: Agent execution paths handle LLM calls, billing events, and tenant-scoped data. Untested agents can silently produce incorrect outputs or leak cross-tenant data.

strict_zones.name: backend-billing
strict_zones.rationale: B-7: Billing code is revenue-critical. Errors here cause direct financial loss. The 75% floor is intentionally higher than other zones.

strict_zones.name: backend-metering
strict_zones.rationale: B-7: Metering drives billing. Silent metering failures result in unbilled usage.
